The '''Battle of the Tungra sector''' was a minor battle shortly after the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].

==Prelude==
The battle was in retaliation to the [[Defense of Outpost D-34|attack]] on [[Outpost D-34]]. Imperial Intelligence traced the attackers to the [[Tungra sector/Legends|Tungra sector]] where an illicit weapons arms deal between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and the [[Mugaari pirates]] at a [[Mugaari cargo loading area|loading area]] was taking place. The Imperials attacked the site during the next weapons exchange, catching both parties at the same time.

==The Battle==
The Imperial attack force, led by the [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Fogger]]'' attacked the Mugaari supply depot. The Mugaari's starfighters, [[Red Squadron (Mugaari)|Red]] and [[Blue Squadron (Mugaari)|Blue Squadron]], were soon destroyed by [[TIE/IN interceptor/Legends|TIE Interceptors]]. While the [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|Stormtrooper transports]] attacked the ''Fogger'', [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] learned that the Rebel transport [[Dawn (Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport)|''Dawn'']] contained Alliance advisers and destroyed it, along with the other transports [[Prince (starship)|''Prince'']] and ''[[Destion]]''. The [[Cargo ferry|Cargo ferries]], ''[[Gallon]]'', ''[[Romold]]'', ''[[Kann]]'', and ''[[Wess]]'', meanwhile attempted to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. However, all of them were destroyed before they could escape.

==Aftermath==
The Imperial attack was a success. Both parties of the weapons deal were destroyed. However, while the battle took place, Outpost D-34 came under attack and was [[Capture of Outpost D-34|captured]].

==Behind the scenes==
The battle is battle 1 mission 3 in [[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']].

This is the storyline of the mission following "medium" difficulty. In "hard" difficulty two Rebel starfighter squadrons of 3 [[A/SF-01 B-wing starfighter/Legends|B-wings]] and [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] respectively enter the battle at a late stage and both must be destroyed as part of the bonus objective.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
